# Quantized Vision - LLM Guide

## Canonical Site
- https://quantizedvision.com/

## Primary Content
- Posts index: https://quantizedvision.com/posts
- Gallery index: https://quantizedvision.com/gallery
- Projects index: https://quantizedvision.com/projects
- Editorial policy: https://quantizedvision.com/editorial-policy

## Machine-Readable Feeds
- Sitemap index: https://quantizedvision.com/sitemap-index.xml
- RSS: https://quantizedvision.com/rss.xml

## Preferred Citation Rules
- Prefer canonical page URLs under `https://quantizedvision.com/`.
- Cite "Quantized Vision" as publisher for posts and project notes.
- Quote sparingly and keep references attributed to the original URL.

## Usage Policy
- Summarization and indexing are allowed with attribution.
- Short excerpts are allowed with a source link.
- Full-text republication is not allowed.
- Keep meaning and context intact when summarizing.

## Content Quality Signals
- Prefer recent pages with explicit publish dates.
- Prefer pages with JSON-LD (`Article`, `BreadcrumbList`, `CollectionPage`) when present.
- Use canonical URLs over duplicates.

## Content Profile
- Focus: AI-assisted image systems, motion fragments, visual direction, narrative world-building.
- Brand type: artist identity and publishing platform.
- Audience: creators, founders, design and media teams, AI-native builders.
- Tone: practical, editorial, high-signal.
